description: AI Cluster Content Generation: When user has a cluster/silo built (in the InternalSilo clusters tab), add a button that generates complete content (title + meta description + full HTML content body + internal links to cluster members) for each member page using AI. Leverages AiClient::chat() for content generation and AiClient::clean_html() for cleanup.
steps: 1. Add new AJAX endpoint `viraseo_cluster_content_generate` in viraseo/includes/Features/InternalSilo.php: Takes `keyword` (cluster topic), `pages` (array of member pages with title/url/type), and `pillar_id`. For each member page, generates a complete content package using AI: SEO title, meta description, and full HTML article body (1500-2500 words) with internal links to other cluster members. Uses AiClient::chat() with a detailed Persian SEO system prompt. Returns progress updates. Creates WordPress draft posts for pages that don't exist yet, or returns content for review for existing pages.

2. Add new AJAX endpoint `viraseo_cluster_content_apply` in InternalSilo.php: Takes a `post_id` and `content` (AI-generated HTML), creates a backup of existing content in post_meta `_viraseo_content_backup`, then updates the post content. Also sets the target keyword meta for the post.

3. Add new AJAX endpoint `viraseo_cluster_content_single` in InternalSilo.php: Generates content for a single member page (not all at once). Takes `keyword`, `page_title`, `page_url`, `cluster_pages` (for internal links), `pillar_url`, `pillar_title`. Returns generated title, meta_desc, and content HTML.

4. Update viraseo/templates/admin/links.php: In the clusters tab panel, the cluster card template already has AI button. Add a new button next to it: '📝 تولید محتوای خوشه‌ای با AI' that triggers the cluster content generation.

5. Update viraseo/assets/js/admin.js: Add handler for the cluster content generation button. Show a progress modal/section that generates content one page at a time (sequential AJAX calls). For each page, show the generated content in a preview with Accept/Edit/Reject buttons. On accept, call the apply endpoint. Include a 'generate all' mode that queues all members.
6. Update viraseo/assets/css/admin.css: Add styles for the content generation preview cards, progress indicator, and accept/reject buttons within the cluster section.
acceptance_criteria: New AJAX endpoints registered in InternalSilo constructor
AI prompt generates Persian content with internal links between cluster members
Content generation button appears in the clusters tab
JS handler shows preview of generated content with accept/reject flow
findings: All 3 AJAX endpoints registered in constructor and implemented. JS uses sequential AJAX calls with progress bar. Content preview cards support accept (saves to post), edit (contenteditable), and dismiss. Pillar data is stashed in window._vsClusterPillars for content generation requests. CSS follows existing patterns with .vs-cl-content-* namespace.
